title: Celerity Handler Manifest
description: Output schema for Celerity language-specific extractor tools. Describes all handlers discovered in a Celerity application module via language-specific metadata scanning. Consumed by the Celerity CLI to merge with blueprint infrastructure configuration.

version.description: Schema version. Consumers should check this field to ensure compatibility.

handlers.description: Class-based handlers discovered from annotated controller or consumer classes.

functionHandlers.description: Function-based handlers registered via framework-provided handler registration functions.

guardHandlers.description: Guard handlers discovered from annotated guard classes or guard registration functions.

AnnotationValue.description: Annotation values are serialized as strings, string arrays, or booleans. Complex objects are JSON-stringified into a string.

Annotations.description:
Key-value annotations using the 'celerity.handler.*' namespace. Well-known keys:
- celerity.handler.http (boolean) — true if this is an HTTP handler
- celerity.handler.http.method (string) — HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS)
- celerity.handler.http.path (string) — full route path using {param} format
- celerity.handler.websocket (boolean) — true if this is a WebSocket handler
- celerity.handler.websocket.route (string) — WebSocket route path
- celerity.handler.websocket.eventType (string) — WebSocket event type (connect, message, disconnect)
- celerity.handler.consumer (boolean) — true if this is a consumer handler
- celerity.handler.consumer.source (string) — blueprint resource name of the consumer source
- celerity.handler.consumer.route (string) — consumer route path
- celerity.handler.schedule (boolean) — true if this is a schedule handler
- celerity.handler.schedule.source (string) — blueprint resource name of the schedule
- celerity.handler.schedule.expression (string) — schedule expression (e.g. rate(1 day), cron(...))
- celerity.handler.custom (boolean) — true if this is a custom/invocable handler
- celerity.handler.custom.name (string) — custom handler name
- celerity.handler.guard.protectedBy (string[]) — guard names protecting this handler
- celerity.handler.guard.custom (string) — custom guard name from guard annotations
- celerity.handler.public (boolean) — true if handler opts out of guards
- celerity.handler.metadata.* (any annotation value) — user-defined metadata annotations

ClassHandlerSpec.description: Deployment specification for a class-based handler.

codeLocation.description: Relative directory path from project root, prefixed with './' (e.g. './src/handlers').

handler.description: Fully qualified handler function reference. Format: moduleBaseName.ClassName.methodName (e.g. 'app.module.OrdersHandler.getOrder').

timeout.description: Handler timeout in seconds. Optional — omitted when not explicitly configured.

FunctionHandlerSpec.description: Deployment specification for a function-based handler.

handlerName.description: Handler identifier derived from the export name.

codeLocation.description: Relative directory path from project root, prefixed with './' (e.g. './src').

handler.description: Fully qualified handler function reference. Format: moduleBaseName.exportName (e.g. 'app.module.getOrder').

ClassHandlerEntry.description: A single handler method discovered from an annotated controller or consumer class.

sourceFile.description: Absolute path to the source file containing the handler.

handlerType.description: The type of handler, derived from the handler's annotations.

FunctionHandlerEntry.description: A function-based handler registered via a framework-provided handler registration function.

resourceName.description: Blueprint resource name derived from the export name.

exportName.description: The named export used to register this handler.

sourceFile.description: Absolute path to the source file containing the handler.

GuardHandlerEntry.description: A guard handler discovered from an annotated guard class or a guard registration function.

resourceName.description: Blueprint resource name for the guard.

guardName.description: The guard name as declared via the guard annotation or registration function.

sourceFile.description: Absolute path to the source file containing the guard.

guardType.description: Whether this guard was defined as a class or a function.

className.description: Name of the guard class. Present for class-based guards only.

exportName.description: The named export used to register this guard. Present for function-based guards only.

DependencyNode.description: A provider or controller in the DI dependency graph.

token.description: Serialized DI token. Class name for class tokens, raw string for string tokens, description for symbol tokens.

providerType.description: How this provider is registered (useClass, useFactory, or useValue).

dependencies.description: Serialized tokens of direct dependencies. Derived from constructor params (class) or inject array (factory).

DependencyGraph.description: Full service dependency graph extracted from module metadata. Includes all providers and controllers with their DI dependencies.
